payload.title: Honor trust.toml in the build gate (cargo trustc / trust-rustc wrapper)
payload.description: trust.toml (rules/allow/severity) is honored by `trust check` only (RT-102). For the dialect to be configurable the same way, the trust-rustc wrapper / cargo trustc must read trust.toml too — per-rule relax/disable at build time, project allows without inline attrs. Lifts TrustConfig out of the trust binary into a shared crate so CLI + wrapper + LSP share one config. RT-102 remaining depth.
